settings.addApiProfileToConnect: Add an API profile to connect to your LLM provider
settings.settingsApplyToAllRequests: Settings that apply to all API requests
settings.maxTimeoutDescription: Maximum time to wait for any LLM response (applies to all services)
settings.blurAmount: Blur amount for the background image.
settings.imageProfilesConfigure: Image profiles configure which provider and API key to use for image generation.
settings.createImageProfileToStart: Create an image profile to start generating images. You can have multiple profiles for different providers or use cases (e.g., portraits vs backgrounds).
settings.referenceProfileDescription: Used when "Portrait Mode" is enabled in your current story. Generates images based on character portraits.
settings.regularProfileDescription: Used when "Portrait Mode" is disabled in your current story.
settings.modelsConfiguredInProfiles: Models are configured in each profile on the Profiles tab.
settings.visualStyleForStory: Visual style for generated story images. Edit styles in the Prompts tab.
settings.profileUsedForGenerating: Profile used for generating character portraits. Model is configured in the profile.
settings.visualStyleForPortraits: Visual style for character portraits. Edit styles in the Prompts tab.
settings.profileUsedForBackgrounds: Profile used for generating background scenes. Model is configured in the profile.
settings.name: Name
settings.multiplePromptNodesFound: Multiple prompt nodes found. Select the one to use as the positive prompt:
settings.howToGetWorkflowFile: How to get the workflow file ›
settings.comfyuiInstructions: Open the ComfyUI web UI → click the gear icon (⚙) → enable Dev Mode. A new "Save (API Format)" button will appear in the toolbar.
settings.buildWorkflowInstructions: Build or load your workflow, then click "Save (API Format)". This saves a .json file that this app can read.
settings.selectLoraToApply: Select a LoRA to apply style or character details.
settings.autoDetectFirstAvailable: Leave empty to auto-detect the first text encoder found in ComfyUI.
settings.autoDetectFirstVae: Leave empty to auto-detect the first VAE found in ComfyUI.
settings.uploadAndConfirmWorkflow: Upload and confirm a workflow before saving.
settings.img2ImgWarning: This profile is used for reference image generation (img2img), but the selected model does not support img2img.
settings.modelDescription: The image model this profile will use for generation.
settings.pingsModelsForLatency: Pings models for latency and status. 1 request/model per 30 min.
settings.configureForCurrentStory: Configure settings for the current story.
settings.replacesTemplateForStory: Replaces the default pack template for this story only. Supports Liquid template variables. Changes take effect on the next generation — no restart needed.
settings.customPackVariables: These may be custom pack variables.
settings.overrideAppliesToThisStoryOnly: This override applies to this story only. The default pack template is untouched and used by all other stories.
settings.customPackVariablesAvailable: Custom pack variables (defined in Vault → Prompts) are also available here. They will appear in the unknown variable warning below, but that's expected — they're resolved at generation time and will work correctly.
settings.considerCustomPromptPack: For more advanced use cases — multiple template variants or sharing prompts across stories — consider creating a custom prompt pack in the Vault instead.
settings.cannotChangeMidStory: Cannot be changed mid-story. Set during story creation.
settings.editFullRequestBody: Edit full request body parameters for advanced models.
settings.manualModeActive: Manual mode active. Temperature and max token controls are locked.
settings.logApiRequests: Log API requests and responses for debugging.
settings.logsSessionOnly: Logs are session-only and not persisted.
settings.useLlmToSelectEntries: Use LLM to intelligently select lorebook entries
settings.howPastChaptersRetrieved: How past chapters are retrieved for context
settings.retrieveContextFromPastChapters: Retrieve context from past chapters during generation
settings.generatesQuestionsAnswers: Generates questions, then answers them from chapters
settings.llmAgentExplores: LLM agent explores chapters and entries with tools
settings.numberOfQuestions: Number of questions generated to query chapter history
settings.maximumToolCallingRounds: Maximum tool-calling rounds for the retrieval agent
settings.recentEntriesIncluded: Recent entries included in AI operations
settings.entriesForRetrieval: Entries for retrieval and classification operations
settings.maxForActionChoices: Max entries for action choice generation
settings.entryCountTriggersLlm: Entry count that triggers LLM-based selection
settings.featuresInActiveDevelopment: These features are in active development. They may change behavior or data formats. Always create a backup before enabling.
settings.downloadFullBackup: Download a full backup of your database and all stories as a ZIP archive. Includes the raw SQLite database and individual story exports (.avt) for maximum safety. You can restore from a backup to revert to a previous state.
settings.recordWorldStateChanges: Record world state changes (deltas) on each story entry after AI classification. This is the foundation for rollback and lightweight branches.
settings.activeDeltasRecorded: Active — deltas will be recorded on new entries.
settings.undoWorldStateChanges: When deleting a message, automatically undo all world state changes from that point onward. Entries after the deleted one are also removed (cascade).
settings.requiresStateTracking: Requires State Tracking to be enabled.
settings.activeDeletingEntriesCascade: Active — deleting entries will cascade and rollback state.
settings.shareParentWorldState: New branches share parent world state instead of copying all entities. Changes are copy-on-write — only modified entities get duplicated.
settings.activeNewBranchesCopyOnWrite: Active — new branches will use copy-on-write.
settings.numberBetweenSnapshots: Number of entries between automatic world state snapshots. Lower values allow faster rollback but use more storage.
settings.keepsAppAlive: Keeps the app alive during text generation when you switch apps or lock your screen. Uses a foreground service and wake lock — may use slightly more battery.
settings.activeBackgrounded: Active — generation will continue when the app is backgrounded.
settings.sendNotification: Send a notification when text generation finishes while the app is in the background.
settings.requiresBackgroundGeneration: Requires Background Generation to be enabled.
settings.showFirstLines: Show the first few lines of generated text in the notification body.
settings.requiresCompletionNotifications: Requires Completion Notifications to be enabled.
settings.somePhoneManufacturers: Note: Some phone manufacturers (Xiaomi, Huawei, Samsung, etc.) have aggressive battery optimization that may still interrupt generation. You may need to exempt Aventura from battery optimization in your device settings.
settings.disableAllExperimental: Disable all experimental features and reset to defaults.
settings.runRawSqlQueries: Run raw SQL queries directly against the internal SQLite database.
settings.dangerZone: Danger zone. Write queries (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP) can permanently modify or corrupt your data. Always create a backup first. Press Ctrl+Enter to run.
settings.fullSettingsIncluded: The backup includes your full settings, which contain your API keys and API provider profiles.
settings.doNotShareFile: Do not share this file with others — anyone with the backup can access your API keys.
settings.replaceEntireDatabase: This will replace your entire database with the one from the backup ZIP.
settings.safetyCopySaved: A safety copy of your current database will be saved as aventura-pre-restore.db in the app data folder.
settings.applicationWillClose: The application will close after restoring. You will need to reopen it manually.
settings.clickTaskToMove: Click a task to move it between profiles.
settings.applyMainNarrativeToAll: Apply the Main Narrative profile and model to all agent profiles?
settings.structuredOutputDescription: Auto uses provider/model capability detection. Force On/Off to override. Using structured output can break reasoning when using local model servers.
settings.injectPromptForThinkTags: Inject a prompt to encourage the model to use <think> tags properly. Useful for some local models such as Mistral models, but may cause issues with other models such as Qwen 3.5. Has no effect when using structured output with local model servers.
settings.overridesRequestParameters: Overrides request parameters; messages and tools are managed by Aventuras.
settings.noModelConfigured: No model configured — story generation is blocked until you set one.
settings.unassignedAgentsWillNotWork: Unassigned agents will not work. Assign them to a profile.
settings.thisProviderRequiresManual: This provider requires manual model configuration. Go to the Generation tab to set models for each service.
settings.expertOverride: Expert override: accepts any value from 256 to 262,144
settings.reasoningSupportedByProvider: Reasoning supported by provider (specific model support unknown)
settings.modelNotFoundInProfile: Model not found in this profile's model list.
settings.usesDefaultFontForTheme: Uses the default font for your selected theme
settings.chooseFromSystemFonts: Choose from fonts installed on your system
settings.loadFromGoogleLibrary: Load fonts from Google Fonts library
settings.enterExactFontName: Enter the exact name of a font installed on your system
settings.enterExactFontNameFromGoogle: Enter the exact font name from fonts.google.com
settings.connectionLatency: Connection latency (initial ping). Does not reflect the model writing/generation speed.
settings.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key or insufficient permissions
settings.rateLimitReached: Provider rate limit reached (429) — quota exhausted, try again later
settings.noApiProfilesConfigured: No API profiles configured. Add one in the API tab.
settings.noModelSelected: No model selected. Choose a model below or set one from the API tab.
settings.noSystemVoicesFound: No system voices found. Make sure you're running on Windows with TTS voices installed.
settings.adjustSpeechSpeed: Adjust the speed of speech generation (0.25-4.0).
settings.automaticallyPlayWhenStory: Automatically play TTS audio when story is narrated.
settings.removeHtmlFromNarratedText: Remove HTML tags from narrated text before sending to TTS.
settings.htmlTagsToRemoveContent: HTML tags to remove content from
settings.commaSeparatedHtmlTags: Comma-separated HTML tags (e.g., div, span, font)
settings.removesContentInsideTags: Removes content inside any HTML tag before narration.
settings.endpointAndApiKeyRequired: Endpoint and API key are required
settings.speechSynthesisNotAvailable: Speech Synthesis API is not available in your browser
settings.voiceNotFound: Voice "{voice}" not found. Please select a different voice.
settings.deleteProfileConfirmation: Delete profile "{name}"? Tasks assigned to it will revert to Unassigned.
settings.thisIsPreview: This is a preview of the selected voice. The story narration will sound like this.

interface.storyContentWidthDescription: Max width of the story area — applies to text and inline images
interface.wordCountDescription: Display current story word count in the status bar
interface.spellcheckDescription: Grammar and spelling suggestions while typing
interface.suggestionsDescription: Show AI-generated action choices and plot suggestions
interface.autoScrollDescription: Automatically scroll to the latest message during generation
interface.floatingScrollToTopDescription: Show a floating button to jump to the first story entry
interface.floatingScrollToBottomDescription: Show a floating button to jump to the latest story entry
interface.enableTranslationDescription: Translate AI responses to your language while keeping English prompts for optimal LLM performance
interface.translateNarrationDescription: Translate AI-generated story content after generation
interface.translateUserInputDescription: Translate your input to English before sending to the AI
interface.translateWorldStateDescription: Translate character names, locations, and items in the UI
interface.checkOnStartupDescription: Automatically check for updates when the app starts
interface.autoDownloadUpdatesDescription: Automatically download updates in the background

settingsModal.title: Settings
settingsModal.subtitle: Configure your Aventuras experience
settingsModal.manualRequestBodyDescription: Edit the manual request body. This overrides request parameters; messages and tools are managed by Aventuras.
settingsModal.resetAllSettingsDescription:
Reset all settings to their default values?

Your API key will be preserved, but all other settings (models, temperatures, prompts, UI preferences) will be reset.

This cannot be undone.
settingsModal.resetAllSettingsWarning: Resets all settings to defaults. API key is preserved.

vault.title: Vault
vault.createFirstCharacter: Create your first character to get started.
vault.createOrImportLorebook: Create a new lorebook or import one from a file.
vault.importCharactersForScenarios: Import character cards to extract scenario settings.
vault.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search terms or filters.

character.name: Name
character.useCategoryFormat: Use "Category: value" format, e.g. Face: oval, Hair: dark. Categories: Face, Hair, Eyes, Build, Clothing, Accessories, Distinguishing features.

scenario.name: Name
scenario.briefOverview: Brief overview shown on the card...
scenario.fillDetails: Fill in the details to create your scenario.
scenario.modifySettings: Modify your scenario settings and characters.

export.title: Export {entity}
export.exportAsAventura: are exported as Aventura JSON format.

diff.deleteCannotEdit: Delete operations cannot be edited — approve or reject directly.

assistant.placeholder: Ask me to create characters, organize lorebooks, set up scenarios...
assistant.enterToSend: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
assistant.shiftEnterToSend: Shift+Enter to send, Enter for new line
assistant.conversationLoaded: Conversation loaded. Continue where you left off!

browser.createOrImportCharacters: Create or import characters in the vault to use them here.
browser.createOrImportLorebooks: Create or import lorebooks in the vault to use them here.
browser.createOrImportScenarios: Create or import scenarios in the vault to use them here.

toast.wordAlreadyInDictionary: Word is already in your custom dictionary
toast.onlySingleWords: Only single words can be added to the dictionary
toast.failedToAddWord: Failed to add word to dictionary
toast.wordNotFoundInDictionary: Word not found in custom dictionary
toast.failedToRemoveWord: Failed to remove word from dictionary
toast.noValidEntriesFound: No valid entries found in this lorebook file

confirm.deleteTag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all vault items.
confirm.resetTime: Reset time to zero? This cannot be undone.
confirm.clearDictionary: Clear all custom dictionary words? This cannot be undone.
